name: Tracy Craig

contactInfo.office: 501 N. Madison Ave., Mount Pleasant, TX 75455

bio: Tracy Craig serves as the Mayor of Mount Pleasant, the county seat of Titus County. Mount Pleasant is a regional hub for northeast Texas and is home to Northeast Texas Community College. The mayor works with the city council to attract business investment and improve the community.
campaignPromises: Attract new industry and jobs to Mount Pleasant
Support Northeast Texas Community College partnerships
Enhance public safety and emergency services
Promote community development and quality of life
